studyName: CRU-Ukrainian National Research Center for Radiation Medicine Trio Study

tables.description: Subject ID, sex, father age, mother age, father and control of drinking alcohol, father smoking status, father gonadal external irradiation, father total years of smoking, mother and drinking alcohol, mother smoking status, mother gonadal external irradiation, and mother total year of smoking of participants with or without external irradiation and involved in the "CRU-Ukrainian National Research Center for Radiation Medicine Trio Study" project.

variables.name: FA_ALCO
variables.description: FATHER - How often does the interviewee drinks alcohol?

variables.name: FA_CURR_SMOK_PC38
variables.description: FATHER - Preconception 38 Weeks: Smoking Status (Former/Current/Never Smoked), truncated 38 weeks prior to child's birth

variables.name: FA_DOSE_NEW_TOTAL_38
variables.description: Father total gonadal dose due to external irradiation during until child's date of birth minus 38 weeks

variables.name: FA_SMOK_NUM_PC38
variables.description: FATHER - Preconception 38 Weeks: How many total years did the interviewee smoke cigarettes regularly, not counting any periods when he stopped smoking?, truncated 38 weeks prior to child's birth

variables.name: MO_ALCO
variables.description: MOTHER - How often does the interviewee drinks alcohol ?

variables.name: MO_CURR_SMOK_PC38
variables.description: MOTHER - Preconception 38 Weeks: Smoking Status (Former/Current/Never Smoked), truncated 38 weeks prior to child's birth

variables.name: MO_DOSE_NEW_TOTAL_38
variables.description: Mother total gonadal dose due to external irradiation during until child's date of birth minus 38 weeks

variables.name: MO_SMOK_NUM_PC38
variables.description: MOTHER - Preconception 38 Weeks: How many total years did the interviewee smoke cigarettes regularly, not counting any periods when he stopped smoking?, truncated 38 weeks prior to child's birth
